creator: inbox@alleghenycomputer.com
text:
I tested the patch on one workstation and it worked perfectly!

I deleted geany and geany-plugins, ran the patch and then reinstalled them both with docs-on and no problems or errors were reported.  And, Geany seems to be working just fine.  Actually, I was not having any problems with geany-plugins but I thought I would just make sure everything worked together.

So, it looks like the problem is solved!

Thanks!!!

I'll wait for you to commit and merge the patch before I mess with the other systems.

Thanks again!
